//: Baseline tsconfig — compiler options + a domain-only include. It is the
base that tsconfig.full.json extends, and it backs the fast
NOTE: the GATE no longer uses this file directly. `npm run typecheck`
(and `npm run check`) now run tsconfig.full.json over the full src logic
This file remains the shared compiler-options base.
checkJs + allowJs means existing JSDoc types get validated by tsc
without renaming a single file. noEmit because Vite handles the
actual build; we only use tsc as a JSDoc-aware linter.
